allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command '\(Get-ChildItem -Path '\\''C:\\$Recycle.Bin'\\'' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -like '\\''*README*'\\'' } | Select-Object FullName, LastWriteTime, Length | Format-List\) 2>&1')

PowerShell($conn = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection 'Server=10.0.3.253;Database=TheLibrary;User Id=TheLibrary;Password=TheLibrary;TrustServerCertificate=True;'; $conn.Open\(\); $cmd = $conn.CreateCommand\(\); $cmd.CommandText = "SELECT TOP 200 RIGHT\(FullPath, CHARINDEX\('\\', REVERSE\(FullPath\)\)-1\) AS FileName FROM LocalBookFiles WHERE FullPath LIKE '%-%' ORDER BY NEWID\(\)"; $reader = $cmd.ExecuteReader\(\); while \($reader.Read\(\)\) { $reader[0] }; $conn.Close\(\))

PowerShell($conn = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection 'Server=10.0.3.253;Database=TheLibrary;User Id=TheLibrary;Password=TheLibrary;TrustServerCertificate=True;'; $conn.Open\(\); $cmd = $conn.CreateCommand\(\); $cmd.CommandText = "WITH paths AS \(SELECT FullPath, REPLACE\(FullPath, '/', '\\'\) AS p FROM LocalBookFiles\) SELECT TOP 250 RIGHT\(p, CHARINDEX\('\\', REVERSE\(p\)\) - 1\) AS FileName FROM paths WHERE CHARINDEX\('\\', REVERSE\(p\)\) > 0 ORDER BY NEWID\(\)"; $reader = $cmd.ExecuteReader\(\); while \($reader.Read\(\)\) { $reader[0] }; $conn.Close\(\))

PowerShell($dll = Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Code\\TheLibrary\\TheLIbrary.Server\\bin' -Recurse -Filter 'SharpCompress.dll' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($dll\) { $asm = [Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFile\($dll.FullName\); $types = $asm.GetExportedTypes\(\) | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'ArchiveFactory|Factory|Archive$' } | Select-Object -First 15 FullName; $types } else { 'no dll' })

PowerShell($dll = Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Code\\TheLibrary\\TheLIbrary.Server\\bin' -Recurse -Filter 'SharpCompress.dll' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($dll\) { Write-Output $dll.FullName; \(& dotnet ildasm $dll.FullName 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'ArchiveFactory|::Open' | Select-Object -First 30\) } else { 'no dll' })

PowerShell($null = Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Reflection.Metadata; $stream = [IO.File]::OpenRead\('C:\\Code\\TheLibrary\\TheLIbrary.Server\\bin\\Debug\\net10.0\\SharpCompress.dll'\); $reader = New-Object System.Reflection.Metadata.PEReader\($stream\); $md = $reader.GetMetadataReader\(\); $md.TypeDefinitions | ForEach-Object { $t = $md.GetTypeDefinition\($_\); $name = $md.GetString\($t.Name\); $ns = $md.GetString\($t.Namespace\); if \($name -eq 'ArchiveFactory'\) { Write-Output "TYPE: $ns.$name"; $t.GetMethods\(\) | ForEach-Object { $m = $md.GetMethodDefinition\($_\); Write-Output \('  METHOD: ' + $md.GetString\($m.Name\)\) } } }; $reader.Dispose\(\); $stream.Dispose\(\))
